summary: The 'Run prettier' job failed with exit code 1 while checking code formatting. The file packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js appears in the output immediately before the error, indicating it contains formatting violations.
root_cause: Prettier formatting check failed on packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js, indicating the file does not conform to the project's code formatting standards.

evidence.reason: The job is explicitly named 'Run prettier', indicating it is a code formatting checker
This file path appears in the log immediately before the error, indicating it is the file that failed the formatting check

evidence.quote: error Command failed with exit code 1.
evidence.reason: Exit code 1 is the typical failure code for formatting tools like prettier when code does not match the required format

suggested_fix: Run prettier to fix formatting issues: yarn prettier --write packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
